scripts.title: FiveM Vehicle Breakdown Script
scripts.description: Dynamic and realistic vehicle failure script based on driven mileage, simulating real wear and tear. Highly configurable, compatible with ESX and QBCore.

installation.content: Clone or download the repository into your FiveM server resources directory.
Place the script files into your server resources directory.
Add the following line to your server.cfg file:
Configure the database. Use the following SQL to create the vehicle_kilometers table:

content: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vehicle_kilometers (
plate VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,

installation.content: Edit the config.lua file according to your needs and restart the server.

configuration.content: The script is highly configurable. Edit config.lua to customize:

scripts.usage: Vehicle failures are triggered automatically based on driven kilometers. The system simulates real wear and different types of breakdowns depending on the configuration.
features: Engine failure: Completely shuts down the vehicle engine
Tire blowout: Randomly bursts a tire
Power loss: Significantly reduces engine power
Fuel leak: Causes a fuel leak
Transmission failure: Temporarily disables the transmission
Battery drain: Completely drains the vehicle battery
Radiator leak: Increases engine temperature
Brake failure: Activates brakes and handbrake
Suspension damage: Lowers suspension height
Alternator failure: Reduces battery health
Transmission fluid leak: Reduces transmission health
Clutch failure: Lowers clutch efficiency
Clogged fuel filter: Decreases fuel level
Door detachment: Randomly causes a door to fall off
Compatible with ESX and QBCore
SQL-based mileage tracking system
Debug mode included
requirements: ESX Framework or QBCore Framework for FiveM
SQL database to store mileage data

scripts.title: Muhaddil Bed Configurator
scripts.description: A simple FiveM script to generate and configure NPC positions for bed animations, ideal for ambulance scripts.

installation.content: Add the resource folder to your server's 'resources' directory.
Add the following line to your server.cfg:
(Optional) Add ACE permissions in your server.cfg:
add_ace group.admin bedconfigurator allow # allow all commands
Use one of the available in-game commands to start configuring positions.

configuration.content: The configurator automatically generates coordinates. Use in-game commands to position NPCs and export the configuration.

scripts.usage: Use the available commands to configure bed positions, pagers, and more. The NPC will automatically follow your camera and you can adjust position, rotation, and height in real time.
features: Generates configurable NPCs near the player
NPC automatically follows camera position
Rotation with left/right arrows or mouse wheel
Height adjustment with up/down arrows
Save configuration with Enter
Cancel configuration with Esc
Modern React UI with NUI
Localization support (multiple languages)
ACE permission system

commands.name: /confighelp
commands.description: Show help message with available commands

controls: Camera tracking: NPC follows where you look
Rotate: Left/Right arrows or Mouse Wheel

scripts.title: Muhaddil Banking System
scripts.description: Comprehensive banking system for FiveM with multiple accounts, loans, transfers, and private bank management. Compatible with ESX and QBCore.

installation.content: Add the following to your server.cfg:
The database will be created automatically on startup (using install.sql).
Edit config.lua according to your needs and restart the server.

scripts.usage: Players can access the bank by approaching bank locations (blue markers) or using the '/banco' command. They can manage multiple accounts, perform transfers, request loans, and buy private banks for investment.
features: Multiple account management (up to 5 per player)
Shared account system (up to 5 users per account)
Full loan system with configurable interest rates
Transfers between accounts by account ID
Private bank purchase system for investment
1% commission on zone transactions for bank owners
Statistics tab with activity charts
4 predefined bank locations (Legion Square, Paleto Bay, West LS, Alta)
Automatic framework detection (ESX/QBCore)
Compatible with ox_lib for notifications and callbacks
Automatic database system with oxmysql
Modern and responsive React interface
Full transaction history
Integrated validation and security system

commands.name: /bankinfo [accountId]
commands.description: View details of a specific account

commands.name: /bankreset [playerId]
commands.description: Deletes all accounts and loans for a player

exports.name: Transfer
exports.description: Triggers a transfer between accounts.

exports.name: GetTotalBankBalance
exports.description: Returns total balance across all accounts for a player.

exports.name: AddMoneyToAccount
exports.description: Programmatically add funds to an account.

exports.name: RemoveMoneyFromAccount
exports.description: Programmatically remove funds from an account.

exports.name: SyncFrameworkBank
exports.description: Forces a balance synchronization with the active framework.

exports.name: ResolveAccountId
exports.description: Resolves an IBAN or numeric ID to an account ID.

exports.name: HasCard
exports.description: Returns whether the player has at least one bank card.

exports.name: GetPlayerCards
exports.description: Returns a list of all cards owned by the player.

exports.name: CreateCard
exports.description: Generates a new physical card for an account.

exports.name: ToggleCardBlock
exports.description: Blocks or unblocks a specific bank card.

exports.name: ChangeCardPin
exports.description: Updates the PIN for a card.

exports.name: DeleteCard
exports.description: Permanently removes a card.

exports.name: GetBankDetails
exports.description: Returns ownership and configuration details of a bank.

exports.name: UpdateBankCommission
exports.description: Updates the transaction commission for a bank.

exports.name: WithdrawBankEarnings
exports.description: Withdraws the accumulated profit from a bank.

exports.name: SellBank
exports.description: Sells the bank ownership.

exports.name: TransferBank
exports.description: Transfers ownership to another player.

exports.name: RegisterDirectDebit
exports.description: Sets up a recurring payment.

exports.name: CancelDirectDebitById
exports.description: Cancels an active direct debit.

exports.name: GetPlayerCreditScore
exports.description: Returns the current credit score for a player.

exports.name: GetTopAccounts
exports.description: Returns a list of the richest accounts.

exports.name: GetActiveLoans
exports.description: Returns all currently active loans in the server.

exports.name: CancelLoan
exports.description: Administratively cancels a loan.

exports.name: GetAccountInfo
exports.description: Returns full administrative details of an account.

exports.name: ResetPlayerBank
exports.description: Completely resets all banking data for a player.

exports.name: OpenBankById
exports.description: Opens the banking UI for a specific bank location.

exports.name: OpenNearestBank
exports.description: Opens the UI for the closest bank location.

exports.name: CloseBank
exports.description: Closes the banking UI.

exports.name: IsBankOpen
exports.description: Returns whether the banking UI is currently open.

exports.name: GetCurrentBank
exports.description: Returns information about the currently open bank location.

exports.name: OpenATM
exports.description: Opens the ATM interface.

exports.name: IsATMOpen
exports.description: Returns whether the ATM interface is open.

exports.name: useCheck
exports.description: Triggers the logic for using a physical check.

exports.name: HasStolenCard
exports.description: Checks if the player is carrying a reported stolen card.
